tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Emaj7[/ch] [ch]B/D#[/ch] [ch]Emaj7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch] [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
[ch]B/D#[/ch]
[ch]Emaj7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]
[tab]              [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I ain't got no     money[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]                   [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    I ain't like those other guys you hang around[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
And it's kinda     funny[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]         [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    But they always seem to let you down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
And I get discouraged, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]         [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    'Cause I never see you anymore[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
And I need your love, babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]       [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    That's all  I'm living for, yeah[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]                             [ch]D#m7[/ch]
     I didn't wanna pressure you, baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#[/ch]                   [ch]G#m7[/ch]
But all I ever wanted to do[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I wanna be your     lover[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                       [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    I wanna be the only one that makes you come    running[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I wanna be your     lover[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]                 [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
    I wanna turn you on,  turn you out[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]
All night long, make you shout[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Oh, lover, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    I wanna be the only one you come for[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I wanna be your     brother[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]                [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                      [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    I wanna be your mother and your sister, too[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
There ain't no     other[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]                [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    That can do the things that I'll do to you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
And I get discouraged[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]           [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    'Cause you treat me just like a child[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
And they say I'm so   shy, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]            [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    But with you     I just go wild, woohoohoo[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]                             [ch]D#m7[/ch]
     I didn't wanna pressure you, baby, no[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#[/ch]                   [ch]G#m7[/ch]
But all I ever wanted to do[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I wanna be your     lover[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                       [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    I wanna be the only one that makes you come    running[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I wanna be your     lover[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]                 [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
    I wanna turn you on,  turn you out[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]
All night long, make you shout[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Oh, lover, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]B/D#[/ch]               [ch]Emaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G#m7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]
    I wanna be the only one you come for,         yeah[/tab]


[Bridge]
[ch]G#m7[/ch]
